title: Villager Clothing Addition (VCA) for MCA Reborn
description: Villager Clothing Addition (VCA) is an addon for MCA Reborn that gives modded villager traders a unique clothing!
body:
# Description

Hard to Identify a villager trader with their clothing from a Modded Profession on MCA Reborn? 

Villager Clothing Addition (VCA) is an Resource Pack for MCA Reborn that gives modded villager traders a unique clothing! (eg. Scribe from Ice and Fire mod)

This project was made due to my habbit of making skins as well as having a struggle identifying modded villager traders from their respective profession. Now you can identify which profession they are from with this Resource Pack!

Everything are made from scratch and due to that are slow in progress!

NOTE: **USE BEFORE OPENING A WORLD OR THE TRADERS WILL BE SHOWN AS UNCLOTHED**

![VCA Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adc573389c99b0a6492df2a778549dca1a2bad18.png)

## Dependencies
Requires [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn)

This Resourcepack Requires you to put in both **Resource Pack** 📂 and **World Datapack **📂 folders or install [Global Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks) or any Global Data Pack Loader

### Roadmap:
**Next Main Focus:**

**More Villager Mod**


**Side Plans / Concept releases:**

**Chef's Delight** , Forestry: Community Edition


**Finshed:**

**Ice and FIre** , Arse Nouveau , **Create: Dynamic Villager**


If you wished to support my works you can buy  me a coffee on https://ko-fi.com/cramezzon ☕

And thank you for downloading my Recourse Pack!
